Hi, I'm

Tobias Henrich

Flutter Developer

I build mobile apps with Flutter and Dart. Focused on clean architecture, great UX, and maintainable code.

View Projects Get in Touch 
class Developer {
  final String name;
  final List<String> skills;
  
  const Developer({
    required this.name,
    required this.skills,
  });
  
  buildAwesomeApps() {
    return skills
      .map((s) => s.apply())
      .toList();
  }
}

final tobi = Developer(
  name: "Tobias Henrich",
  skills: ["Flutter", "Dart", "Firebase"],
);

01. About Me

I'm Tobias, a passionate Flutter developer from St. Ingbert, Germany. Mobile app development is my passion – I love turning ideas into working apps.

For several years I've been developing apps for various industries, from logistics to e-commerce to agriculture. I focus on performant, user-friendly solutions.

When I'm not coding, I'm working on new project ideas or improving my existing apps.

3+ Years Experience
Flutter Enthusiast
100% Passion

02. Skills

📱

Flutter

Cross-platform app development with Material Design & Cupertino widgets

🎯

Dart

Clean code, async/await, streams, state management

🔥

Firebase

Auth, Firestore, Cloud Functions, push notifications

🐙

Git

Version control, branching strategies, GitHub workflows

🗄️

Backend

REST APIs, Supabase, SQLite, local databases

🎨

UI/UX

Responsive design, animations, user-centered development

03. Projects

🛒
Live App

FmShop

Shop app for the fruit and vegetable trade. Customers can order fresh produce directly from the producer. Intuitive product search, cart, and order tracking.

FlutterFirebaseStripeGoogle Maps
🚚
Live App

FmTourenplaner

Logistics app for the fruit and vegetable trade. Optimizes delivery routes, manages tours, and tracks deliveries in real-time. Efficient planning for daily operations.

FlutterFirebaseMaps SDKPush
🐴
In Development

Horsemanager

App for managing horse farms. Horse profiles, feeding plans, appointments, riding lessons, and stable management in one app. Currently in active development.

FlutterRiverpodSupabaseCalendar
